sentences.target: J'ai une bonne note en maths.

translations.fr: J'ai une bonne note en maths.
translations.en: I have a good grade in math.
translations.es: Tengo una buena nota en matemáticas.
translations.de: Ich habe eine gute Note in Mathe.
translations.it: Ho un buon voto in matematica.
translations.ru: У меня хорошая оценка по математике.
translations.pt: Tenho uma boa nota em matemática.
translations.vi: Tôi được điểm tốt môn toán.
translations.ar: حصلت على علامة جيدة في الرياضيات.
translations.nl: Ik heb een goed cijfer voor wiskunde.
translations.uk: У мене добра оцінка з математики.
translations.hi: मुझे गणित में अच्छे अंक मिले।
translations.nb: Jeg har en god karakter i matte.
translations.sv: Jag har ett bra betyg i matte.
translations.ro: Am o notă bună la matematică.
translations.da: Jeg har en god karakter i matematik.
translations.ja: 数学でいい成績を取りました。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) elided before a vowel-initial verb; marks the subject.
Present indicative 1st person singular of 'avoir'; main lexical verb expressing possession.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the noun 'note'.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular, agreeing with 'note' and modifying its quality.
Common noun, feminine; head of the object noun phrase; here meaning a school grade.
Preposition introducing a complement of field/topic ('in').
Noun (abbreviation of 'mathématiques'); object of 'en'; denotes the subject area.

sentences.target: Tu écris une note pour ton coloc.
sentences.reading: /ty ekʁi yn nɔt puʁ tɔ̃ kɔlɔk/

translations.fr: Tu écris une note pour ton coloc.
translations.ipa: /ty ekʁi yn nɔt puʁ tɔ̃ kɔlɔk/
translations.en: You write a note for your roommate.
translations.es: Escribes una nota para tu compañero de piso.
translations.de: Du schreibst einen Zettel für deinen Mitbewohner.
translations.it: Scrivi un biglietto per il tuo coinquilino.
translations.yue: 你寫張字條畀你嘅室友。
translations.ru: Ты пишешь записку своему соседу по квартире.
translations.pt: Você escreve um bilhete para o seu colega de quarto.
translations.vi: Bạn viết một mẩu giấy cho bạn cùng phòng.
translations.nl: Je schrijft een briefje voor je huisgenoot.
translations.uk: Ти пишеш записку своєму сусіду по кімнаті.
translations.hi: तुम अपने रूममेट के लिए एक पर्ची लिखते हो।
translations.el: Γράφεις ένα σημείωμα για τον συγκάτοικό σου.
translations.nb: Du skriver en lapp til romkameraten din.
translations.id: Kamu menulis catatan untuk teman sekamarmu.
translations.sv: Du skriver en lapp till din rumskompis.
translations.ro: Scrii un bilet pentru colegul tău de cameră.
translations.da: Du skriver en seddel til din bofælle.
translations.ja: ルームメイトにメモを書きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Present indicative 2nd person singular of 'écrire'; main lexical verb.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'note'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'écris'; here a written memo/message.
Preposition marking beneficiary/purpose ('for').
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'coloc'.
Common noun, colloquial abbreviation of 'colocataire'; object of 'pour'.

sentences.target: On partage la note au restaurant.

translations.fr: On partage la note au restaurant.
translations.en: We split the bill at the restaurant.
translations.es: Compartimos la cuenta en el restaurante.
translations.de: Wir teilen die Rechnung im Restaurant.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chia tiền hóa đơn ở nhà hàng.
translations.nl: We delen de rekening in het restaurant.
translations.hi: हम रेस्तरां में बिल बांटते हैं।
translations.sv: Vi delar på notan på restaurang.
translations.cs: Dělíme se o účet v restauraci.
translations.ja: レストランで割り勘にします。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/pragmatic subject pronoun; commonly used for 'we'; syntactically 3rd person singular.
Present indicative 3rd person singular of 'partager'; main lexical verb.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'note'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'partage'; here the bill/check.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition introducing the location 'restaurant'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Cette note est trop haute pour moi.
sentences.reading: /sɛt nɔt ɛ tʁo ot puʁ mwa/

translations.fr: Cette note est trop haute pour moi.
translations.ipa: /sɛt nɔt ɛ tʁo ot puʁ mwa/
translations.en: That note is too high for me.
translations.es: Esa nota es demasiado alta para mí.
translations.de: Dieser Ton ist zu hoch für mich.
translations.it: Questa nota è troppo alta per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个音对我来说太高了。
translations.ru: Эта нота для меня слишком высокая.
translations.pt: Essa nota é alta demais para mim.
translations.tr: Bu nota benim için fazla yüksek.
translations.vi: Nốt đó quá cao đối với tôi.
translations.ar: تلك النغمة عالية جدًا بالنسبة לי.
translations.nl: Die toon is te hoog voor mij.
translations.uk: Ця нота для мене надто висока.
translations.hu: Az a hang túl magas nekem.
translations.hi: वह सुर मेरे लिए बहुत ऊँचा है।
translations.pl: Ten dźwięk jest dla mnie za wysoki.
translations.el: Αυτή η νότα είναι πολύ ψηλή για μένα.
translations.nb: Den tonen er for høy for meg.
translations.sv: Den tonen är för hög för mig.
translations.ro: Nota asta este prea înaltă pentru mine.
translations.cs: Ten tón je na mě moc vysoký.
translations.da: Den tone er for høj for mig.
translations.fi: Se sävel on minulle liian korkea.
translations.ja: その音は私には高すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; points to a specific 'note'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
Copular verb 'être', present 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb intensifying 'haute' ('too').
Predicate adjective, feminine singular; agrees with 'note' and describes its level.
Preposition marking comparison/acceptability ('for').
Strong/stressed 1st person singular pronoun; complement of 'pour'.

On partage la note au restaurant.
